hero.title: Services
hero.subtitle: Clear scope, efficient delivery, results you can trust.

items.title: External audit readiness
items.description: End-to-end preparation including documentation, walkthroughs and liaison with auditors.

items.title: Internal control design & review
items.description: Control frameworks aligned with COSO, tailored to your risk profile.

items.title: Regulatory compliance advisory
items.description: Gap analysis, remediation plans and ongoing compliance support.

items.title: Policies & procedures
items.description: Practical policies and SOPs that are clear, complete and usable.

items.title: Risk assessment
items.description: Structured approach to identify, assess and prioritize enterprise risks.

items.title: Training & awareness
items.description: Targeted sessions to embed controls and compliance across teams.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.text: Understand objectives, constraints and current state.

steps.title: Assessment
steps.text: Evidence-based analysis to identify gaps and priorities.

steps.title: Implementation
steps.text: Pragmatic actions, clear ownership and timelines.
